settings.text: Combining microneedling, vibration, and red light therapy to support scalp stimulation and hair-density appearance—backed by science, designed for visible results for many users.

settings.custom_liquid: Free shipping - arrives in 5-7 business days

settings.headline: Losing Hair Doesn't Mean Losing Hope
settings.body_copy:
Thinning hair, widening parts, or an ever-visible scalp—it's an experience no one wants, and it affects men and women of all ages. But you don't need to settle for hopelessness or dependency on harsh chemicals.

Nuvé Stamp gives you a modern, science-backed solution: our electric dermastamp with red light and vibration technology supports scalp stimulation and puts your scalp-care routine back in your control—right at home, painlessly and safely.
settings.emotional_hook: Regain your confidence. Rediscover your best hair—no clinic visits, no prescriptions.
settings.cta_text: See How Nuvé Stamp Changes Hair Regrowth

settings.heading: Why Choose Nuvé Stamp?
settings.benefit_1_text: Supports scalp care for fuller-looking, thicker-looking hair
settings.benefit_2_text: Combines microneedling, vibration, and red light therapy
settings.benefit_3_text: Easy-to-use, comfort-focused, and built for home use
settings.benefit_4_text: Visible improvements in around 8–12 weeks for many users
settings.benefit_5_text: No drugs, chemicals, or invasive treatments

settings.headline: How Nuvé Stamp Reactivates Your Hair
settings.step_1_description: Tiny precision needles create micro-channels in the scalp, triggering your body's natural growth response and maximizing serum absorption.
settings.step_2_description: Soothes the scalp, enhances comfort, and helps drive growth factors deeper—no pain, no fuss.
settings.step_3_description: Stimulates hair follicles at a cellular level, boosting growth and supporting thick, healthy thickness support—clinically studied wavelengths included.
settings.footer_text: Use Nuvé Stamp 2–3x per week consistently. Many users report visible results in around 8–12 weeks.

settings.heading: See the Nuvé Stamp Difference
settings.testimonial_quote_1: I started seeing visible results after just a month—and my barber even noticed!
settings.testimonial_quote_2: I tried everything. Only Nuvé Stamp made my part look fuller again.
settings.testimonial_quote_3: The vibrations made it so much less scary than regular rollers!

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.question_1: How quickly can I expect visible results?
settings.answer_1: Many users report thicker, denser-looking hair within 8 to 12 weeks when using Nuvé Stamp consistently as directed.
settings.answer_2: No! The tiny needles and vibration make the experience comfortable. Most users describe it as a gentle tickle or tingling sensation.
settings.answer_3: Nuvé Stamp is designed for adults experiencing mild to moderate hair thinning or loss. Safe for both men and women, and for all hair types.
settings.question_4: Can I use hair serums with Nuvé Stamp?
settings.answer_4: Absolutely! Microneedling can help serums absorb more deeply and work better.
settings.question_5: How often should I use it?
settings.answer_5: Use 2-3x per week on clean, dry scalp for optimal results.
settings.question_6: Is it safe for sensitive or color-treated scalps?
settings.answer_6: Yes, just use gentle pressure and always follow the included instructions.
